privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.content:
1. General Provisions

This Privacy Policy determines the procedure for processing and protecting the personal data of users of the FLOCO service (hereinafter referred to as the “Service”). We respect the personal information of our customers and guarantee its safety.

2. Collection and Use of Information

When placing an order, we collect the following data:

  • Name and contact phone number of the customer;
  • Name and contact phone number of the recipient (if the order is not placed for oneself);
  • Delivery address;
  • Comments and wishes for the order.

These data are used exclusively for:

  • Processing and delivering your order;
  • Contacting you to confirm details;
  • Improving the quality of our service.

3. Data Protection

We take all necessary technical and organizational measures to protect your personal information from unauthorized access, modification, disclosure or destruction. Your data is transferred only to FLOCO employees (managers, florists and couriers) directly involved in fulfilling your order.

4. Anonymous Delivery

If you choose the “Anonymous Delivery” option, we guarantee that the recipient will not know your name or contact details. All information about the sender remains strictly confidential and is not passed on to the recipient under any circumstances.

5. Changes to the Privacy Policy

We reserve the right to make changes to this Policy. The new version of the Policy comes into force from the moment it is published on this page.

6. Contacts

If you have any questions regarding our Privacy Policy, please contact us via WhatsApp or Instagram, indicated in the “Contacts” section.
